data.content: Added src/lib/beads-skill-prompts.ts with getBeadsSkillPrompt(step, beatId, currentState) covering planning, plan_review, implementation, implementation_review, shipment, and shipment_review using bd commands only (no kno references). Added unit tests in src/lib/__tests__/beads-skill-prompts.test.ts validating per-step transitions and command content. Quality gates run: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and NODE_ENV=production bun run build.
